Name: FMeshBuildSettings
Description: Settings applied when building a mesh.

Variables.Name: bUseMikkTSpace
Variables.Description: If true, degenerate triangles will be removed.

Variables.Name: bRecomputeNormals
Variables.Description: If true, normals in the raw mesh are ignored and recomputed.

Variables.Name: bRecomputeTangents
Variables.Description: If true, tangents in the raw mesh are ignored and recomputed.

Variables.Name: bRemoveDegenerates
Variables.Description: If true, degenerate triangles will be removed.

Variables.Name: bBuildAdjacencyBuffer
Variables.Description: Required for PNT tessellation but can be slow. Recommend disabling for larger meshes.

Variables.Name: bBuildReversedIndexBuffer
Variables.Description: Required to optimize mesh in mirrored transform. Double index buffer size.

Variables.Name: bUseHighPrecisionTangentBasis
Variables.Description: If true, Tangents will be stored at 16 bit vs 8 bit precision.

Variables.Name: bUseFullPrecisionUVs
Variables.Description: If true, UVs will be stored at full floating point precision.

Variables.Name: BuildScale3D
Variables.Description: The local scale applied when building the mesh

Variables.Name: DistanceFieldResolutionScale
Variables.Description:
Scale to apply to the mesh when allocating the distance field volume texture.
	  The default scale is 1, which is assuming that the mesh will be placed unscaled in the world.

Variables.Name: bGenerateDistanceFieldAsIfTwoSided
Variables.Description:
Whether to generate the distance field treating every triangle hit as a front face.
	  When enabled prevents the distance field from being discarded due to the mesh being open, but also lowers Distance Field AO quality.
